code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut current = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        current = 0
        sign = 1
      end
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      current = 0
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      current = 0
      sign = 1
    else
      if in_num
        sum = sum + sign * current
        count = count + 1
        in_num = false
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  sum = sum + sign * current
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
